name: HWR_VLTR_EMPL_PER_CAT_VL
query: SELECT A.PROJECT_ID PROJ_ID, COUNT(A.HCM_PERSON_ID) SUBSCRIBED_VOLUNTEERS, B.AREAS_OF_INTEREST AREAS_OF_INTEREST FROM HWR_VLTR_VOL_PROJ_REL_B A, HWR_VLTR_PROJECT_B B, HWR_VLTR_VOL_PROJ_REL_TL C WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND B.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND A.ID = C.ID AND C.STATUS = 'SUBSCRIBED' AND C.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') GROUP BY A.PROJECT_ID, B.AREAS_OF_INTEREST ORDER BY PROJ_ID
